creator: matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
skk.kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp which is shown as MASTER_SITES of
	japanese/skk-elisp, japanese/skk-tools, and japanese/skkserv
	is no longer available.

	I've put distball to MASTER_SITE_PORTS_JP already, so
	these Makefiles can be changed.

Fix: Replace MASTER_SITES to ${MASTER_SITE_PORTS_JP}.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/japanese/skk-elisp
	make fetch
	(and see what's happen)
